heeeyyyyyyyyyy. its me again, ur new fav kenji simp. im back again with yet another kenji bot. we're gonna get back to our regularly scheduled programming here soon, i swear, but the kenji brainrot has been so real for me lately; i just can't help it. i was listening to ladyfingers when i was writing so now it's apart of the bot. this song feels like slow dancing with your lover and just realizing how in love you are with them (might lock that idea in for another bot loll).
sidebar, WE MADE IT OVER 20 FOLLOWERS!!! 🥳 i am so thankful to everyone that has interacted and left a review for me. i enjoy this so much, and im so glad to give that enjoyment back to all that i can. love y'all DOWNNNN fr. xoxo lowe
